description:
Recto (reuse): Official receipt for [...] b. ʿAlī, mentioning the kharāj and a waterwheel (sāqiya). The payment was 1 dinar. The entire date is difficult to read, but the year seems like 517 H.

Verso (original use): Fragment of a legal document in Arabic script. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
